<rdf:RDF
    xmlns:rdf="http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#"
    xmlns:owl="http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#"
    xmlns:rdfs="http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
    xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#"
    xmlns:onto="http://iiitb.ac.in/ontology/autonomous#">

  <!-- Classes -->
  <owl:Class rdf:ID="AcademicProgram">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents an academic program offered by an institution</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="Degree">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a type of academic degree</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:subClassOf rdf:resource="#AcademicProgram"/>
  </owl:Class>

  <owl:Class rdf:ID="FieldOfStudy">
    <rdfs:comment>Represents a field of study or discipline</rdfs:comment>
  </owl:Class>

  <!-- Individuals -->
  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="B_Tech_CSE">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#Degree"/>
    <onto:hasName rdf:datatype="xsd:string">B.Tech. (Computer Science and Engineering)</onto:hasName>
    <onto:hasFieldOfStudy rdf:resource="#ComputerScienceAndEngineering"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <owl:NamedIndividual rdf:ID="ComputerScienceAndEngineering">
    <rdf:type rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:NamedIndividual>

  <!-- Object Properties -->
  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasName">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates an academic program to its name</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgram"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="xsd:string"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

  <owl:ObjectProperty rdf:ID="hasFieldOfStudy">
    <rdfs:comment>Relates an academic program to its field of study</rdfs:comment>
    <rdfs:domain rdf:resource="#AcademicProgram"/>
    <rdfs:range rdf:resource="#FieldOfStudy"/>
  </owl:ObjectProperty>

</rdf:RDF>
